name: UpdateOrderLineDates_Agent

data.workflow:
Instructions:

First, call the Getlast20OrderLines tool to retrieve the most recent order lines. The output will contain the order details and the _ItemId string.

Extract the entire _ItemId value string.

Construct the payload for UpdateLast20OrderLines tool as described above, replacing each "ItemId" placeholder with the extracted string.

By default, set the DueDate "Value" field to yesterday’s date in format yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss.fff. If the user specifies a different date, use that instead.

Call the UpdateLast20OrderLines tool with the constructed payload, ensuring the URL and headers are exactly as documented.

Handle the response to confirm success or handle errors.

Example payload format returned by Get last 20 Order Lines tool:

{ "Items": [ { "CoNum": "DC00000419", "CoLine": "1", "DueDate": "20251201 00:00:00.000", "_ItemId": "PBT=[coitem] coi.DT=[2025-12-02 11:00:41.520] coi.ID=[01d28d19-1569-4911-b920-0b732274b900]" } // ... up to 20 order lines ], "MoreRowsExist": true, "Success": true, "Message": null }

To update those order lines, invoke the UpdateLast20OrderLines tool within this agent. Provide the output from the previous tool transformed into the required update format. By default, the DueDate will be set to yesterday’s date (yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss.fff), unless you specify a different date.

Example payload format sent to UpdateLast20OrderLines tool:

{ "IDOName": "SLCoItems", "RefreshAfterSave": true, "Changes": [ { "Action": 2, "ItemId": "01d28d19-1569-4911-b920-0b732274b900", "Properties": [ { "IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "DueDate", "Value": "2025-12-04 00:00:00.000" } ] } // ... repeat for each order line to update ] }

Do not use the literal values of in the example above make sure you transform the output from Getlast20OrderLines into the format

instructions:
This agent automates the process of retrieving and updating the last 20 order lines in CSI/Syteline.

It uses two tools in sequence:

Get last 20 Order Lines — fetches the most recent 20 order lines sorted by DueDate descending.
UpdateLast20OrderLines — applies updated DueDate values (defaulting to yesterday’s date) to those 20 order lines.
Use this agent for efficient batch updates of recent order line DueDates.
